ExampleAvailability.description: How a shipped example can be used.

oneOf.description: The example can be rendered by `hpc-compose new --template`.
The example is a repository YAML file users copy directly.

ExampleInfo.description: A shipped runnable example or starter template.

availability.description: Whether `hpc-compose new` can scaffold this example directly.

category.description: Broad workflow category used for grouping.

demonstrates.description: Short description of the feature or workflow demonstrated.

name.description: Stable example id without the `.yaml` suffix.

path.description: Repository path to the YAML file.

start_when.description: User-facing guidance for when this is a good starting point.
